question: What is the main activity happening in the image? Select from the following options: (A) A band is on stage at night with people. (B) People are playing music in a bar. (C) People are having a party outdoors. (D) People are attending a concert in a park.
gold_answer: People are playing music in a bar
answer_choices: A band is on stage at night with people
People are playing music in a bar
People are having a party outdoors
People are attending a concert in a park
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
inpaint_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, artifacts, distortion, blur
